findings.evidence: Handed the week's records for reconciliation yet defined in no container table, no manifest module, no goal.
No integration row or event path carries shift changes to the notification side; goal 3's one-hour window is unmet by construction.
100k concurrent sessions is asserted nowhere in the goals; the stated peak is a few dozen people.
Badges and the volunteer leaderboard trace to none of the six goals.
Stated as obvious with no alternative recorded; one line on why not an SPA would make the decision auditable.
